title: Cinematic Flow

# Cinematic Flow

Cinematic Flow is a mod that helps you create cinematic camera movements between points in your world. Instead of walking or flying to show off your builds, you can set up a path that automatically moves your camera while you sit back and watch.

## How It Works

The mod gives you a set of tools in your inventory when you use the `/cinema start` command. These items let you:

- **Set markers** at different locations in your world
- **Remove markers** if you place them in the wrong spot  
- **Set a focus point** that your camera will look at during movement
- **Edit individual markers** to control timing and names
- **Adjust settings** for different movement styles

Once you've placed at least two markers, use the start item to begin recording your cinematic. Your camera will move from marker to marker.

## What Makes It Different

Most camera mods are complicated or require learning complex commands. Cinematic Flow keeps things simple - just right-click with the tools to place markers where you want your camera to go. The mod handles all the movement calculations for you.

You can choose between different movement styles like `linear` paths or `curved Catmull-Rom` splines. Each marker can have its own timing, so you can slow down at important parts of your build and speed up through transitions.

## Perfect For

- **Builders** who want to showcase their creations
- **Content creators** making videos  
- **Server owners** creating tours of spawn areas or important builds
- **Players** who just want to experience their world from a new perspective

The mod works entirely server-side, so everyone on a multiplayer server can see your camera movements. No need for everyone to install it separately.

## Simple Setup

1. Install the mod on your server or in singleplayer
2. Use `/cinema start` to get your tools
3. Right-click with the marker tool to place points along your desired path
4. Right-click with the start tool to begin your cinematic
5. Use the stop tool to end recording and return to normal gameplay
